title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 1220 至 1320 行，共 1441 行) ---
1220 |             # 这是 GPT-5.5 严格要求的关键检查！
1221 |             if msg.get("role") == "assistant" and "tool_calls" in msg:
1222 |                 tool_calls = msg.get("tool_calls", [])
1223 | 
1224 |                 for tc in tool_calls:
1225 |                     tool_call_id = tc.get("id")
1226 |                     if not tool_call_id:
1227 |                         continue
1228 | 
1229 |                     # 向后检查紧邻的连续 tool 响应块，不能跨过 user/assistant/system 等其它消息查找。
1230 |                     expected_ids = {tc.get("id") for tc in tool_calls if tc.get("id")}
1231 |                     contiguous_tool_ids = set()
1232 |                     j = i + 1
1233 |                     while j < len(messages) and messages[j].get("role") == "tool":
1234 |                         contiguous_tool_ids.add(messages[j].get("tool_call_id"))
1235 |                         j += 1
1236 |                     found_tool = tool_call_id in contiguous_tool_ids
1237 | 
1238 |                     # 🔥🔥🔥 GPT-5.5 严格要求：每个 tool_call_id 都必须有对应的 tool 消息
1239 |                     if not found_tool:
1240 |                         print(f"   ❌ 错误: Assistant 消息 [{i}] 的 tool_call_id={tool_call_id} 没有对应的 tool 消息")
1241 |                         print(f"   💡 这是 GPT-5.5 严格要求：每个 tool_calls 都必须有对应的 tool 消息响应")
1242 |                         return False
1243 | 
1244 |         return True
1245 | 
1246 |     def _sanitize_openai_tool_pairs(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
1247 |         """
1248 |         删除 OpenAI strict tools 不接受的半截工具调用消息。
1249 | 
1250 |         OpenAI 兼容接口要求 assistant(tool_calls) 与后续 tool 响应必须成对出现。
1251 |         压缩、LLM 摘要超时回退、滑动窗口补齐等路径都可能只保留 pair 的一半，
1252 |         因此发送前/压缩后统一做一次安全清理：
1253 |         - tool 消息若找不到前置 assistant(tool_calls)，删除该 tool；
1254 |         - assistant(tool_calls) 若任一 tool_call_id 找不到后续 tool，删除该 assistant。
1255 |         """
1256 |         sanitized = [dict(msg) if isinstance(msg, dict) else msg for msg in messages]
1257 |         turns = TurnBuilder().build(sanitized)
1258 |         complete_messages = TurnBuilder().build_complete_messages(sanitized)
1259 |         if len(complete_messages) != len(sanitized):
1260 |             removed = len(sanitized) - len(complete_messages)
1261 |             incomplete_turns = [turn for turn in turns if not turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn]
1262 |             print(f"   [工具调用清理] 删除 {removed} 条半截 tool pair 消息，涉及 {len(incomplete_turns)} 个不完整 turn")
1263 |         return complete_messages
1264 | 
1265 |     def _select_recent_complete_turn_messages(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]], target_count: int) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
1266 |         """Select recent complete turns without splitting OpenAI tool pairs."""
1267 |         builder = TurnBuilder()
1268 |         complete_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(messages))
1269 |         selected = []
1270 |         selected_count = 0
1271 | 
1272 |         for turn in reversed(complete_turns):
1273 |             turn_size = len(turn.messages)
1274 |             if selected and selected_count >= target_count:
1275 |                 break
1276 |             selected.append(turn)
1277 |             selected_count += turn_size
1278 | 
1279 |         selected.reverse()
1280 |         return builder.flatten(selected)
1281 | 
1282 |     def _select_keyframe_turns(
1283 |         self,
1284 |         turns: List[ConversationTurn],
1285 |         target_count: int,
1286 |         min_keep: int,
1287 |     ) -> List[ConversationTurn]:
1288 |         """Select keyframe turns using Turn metadata while preserving order."""
1289 |         if not turns:
1290 |             return []
1291 | 
1292 |         selected_by_id: Dict[str, ConversationTurn] = {}
1293 | 
1294 |         # Always keep the most recent complete turns for task continuity.
1295 |         recent_budget = max(min_keep, int(target_count * 0.45))
1296 |         recent_count = 0
1297 |      ...
